page_content: Government and Politics: GVPT170 American Government Supporting Area: Select 4 upper upper-level courses for a minimum of 12 credits in a supporting ﬁeld 4 Select four additional upper-level courses for a minimum of 12 credits 4 Journalism Course Requirements JOUR152 Introduction to Storytelling with Code JOUR200 Journalism History, Roles and Structures JOUR201 News Writing and Reporting I JOUR320 News Writing and Reporting II: Multiplatform JOUR352 Interactive Design and Development JOUR396 Supervised Internship JOUR402 Journalism Law and Ethics Journalism and Society Course (One JOUR course from the 410-469 range) Media Research Course (One JOUR course from the 470-479 range) Menu 1 - Visual Menu (One course from the following): JOUR347 News Videography JOUR370 Photojournalism Menu 2- Exploration Menu (One course from the following): JOUR202 News Editing JOUR347 News Videography JOUR360 News Writing and Reporting II: Broadcast JOUR370 Photojournalism JOUR371 Feature Writing Journalism Capstone Experience Upper-Level Courses of Choice. A minimum of 9 credits must be upper-level JOUR courses, at least 6 of which must be upper-level skills courses in the 321-389 range. 1 Should a student choose to combine the options, at least one language course must be at the intermediate level 3 12 12 1 3 3 3 3 2 3 3 3 3 3 3-9 9-15
